chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 822 - وَ قَدْ نَقَلَ عَنْهُ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ أَهْلُ اَلْخِلاَفِ أَيْضاً: أَنَّهُ أَمَرَ بِالتَّلَحِّي وَ نَهَى عَنِ اَلاِقْتِعَاطِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.822 - It has also been reported from the Messenger, by those outside the Shi'a tradition that he commanded the wearing of turbans (tallaḥḥi) and forbade wrapping without a tail (iqti'āṭ).
